title: The Devil Wears Prada 2
longDescription: Miranda, Andy, Emily and Nigel return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine.
shortDescription: Miranda, Andy, Emily and Nigel return to the fashionable streets of New York and Runway Magazine.

title: Michael
longDescription: The story of pop superstar Michael Jackson -- from his extraordinary early days in the Jackson 5 to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fuels a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world.
shortDescription: Michael Jackson's creative ambition fuels a relentless pursuit to become the world's biggest star.

title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie
longDescription: Mario, Luigi and Princess Peach embark on an adventure across the galaxy.
shortDescription: Mario, Luigi and Princess Peach embark on an adventure across the galaxy.

title: Passenger
longDescription: A young couple witness a horrific accident that leaves the driver dead. They soon encounter a demonic stalker who's impossible to outrun and follows them wherever they go.
shortDescription: A couple encounter a demonic stalker who's impossible to outrun and follows them wherever they go.

title: Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu
longDescription: The evil Empire has fallen but Imperial warlords remain scattered throughout the galaxy. As the fledgling New Republic works to protect everything the Rebellion fought for, they enlist the help of legendary Mandalorian bounty hunter Din Djarin and his young apprentice Grogu.
shortDescription: The New Republic enlists the help of a legendary Mandalorian bounty hunter and his young apprentice.

title: Mortal Kombat II
longDescription: Johnny Cage joins other fighters in the ultimate, no-holds-barred battle to defeat the dark rule of Shao Kahn, a powerful tyrant who threatens the very existence of the Earthrealm and its defenders.
shortDescription: Johnny Cage joins other fighters in a no-holds-barred battle to defeat the dark rule of Shao Kahn.

title: I Love Boosters
longDescription: Professional shoplifters embark on a wild adventure as they target a cutthroat fashion mogul.
shortDescription: Professional shoplifters embark on a wild adventure as they target a cutthroat fashion mogul.

title: The Sheep Detectives
longDescription: George Hardy is a shepherd who loves to read murder mysteries to his sheep, never suspecting that they can understand him. When George is found dead under mysterious circumstances, the sheep decide to solve the crime themselves, even if it means leaving their meadow for the first time and facing the fact that the human world isn't as simple as it appears in books.
shortDescription: A flock of sheep leaves their meadow to investigate the mysterious death of their beloved shepherd.

title: Obsession
longDescription: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic gets exactly what he asked for. However, he soon discovers that some desires come at a dark and sinister price.
shortDescription: Desire comes at a dark and sinister price when a man makes a wish to win his crush's heart.

title: Is God Is
longDescription: Two sisters embark on an epic quest for revenge, confronting a charged family history that pushes them to extraordinary lengths.
shortDescription: Vengeful sisters confront a charged family history that pushes them to extraordinary lengths.

title: In the Grey
longDescription: A covert team of elite operatives embarks on a mission to steal back a billion-dollar fortune from a ruthless tyrant.
shortDescription: Elite operatives embark on a mission to steal back a billion-dollar fortune from a ruthless tyrant.

title: Pressure
longDescription: The fate of the free world hangs in the balance as Gen. Dwight D. Eisenhower and Capt. James Stagg face an impossible choice -- launch the D-Day invasion or risk losing World War II altogether.
shortDescription: Gen. Dwight D. Eisenhower and Capt. James Stagg prepare to launch the D-Day invasion.

title: Corporate Retreat
longDescription: Corporate executives on a team-building retreat face a deadly struggle when their leader turns violently against them.
shortDescription: Corporate executives on a retreat face a deadly struggle when their leader turns against them.
